response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of broad full-stack engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems (Dunnhumby/Sociomantic micro-services handling millions of requests/sec), plus current Staff-level work at Google on AI-agent infrastructure. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging systems, A/B testing frameworks, statistical analysis, or growth measurement — the core focus of this Principal IC6 role. Technical leadership signals are present (talks, workshops, mentoring, OSS) but evidence of architecting cross-team systemic platforms is thin compared to what IC6 demands.
strengths: 15+ years engineering breadth with polyglot proficiency (TS/JS, C/C++, Java, C#, Python-adjacent, DLang)
Proven low-latency/high-scale production experience at Sociomantic and current Staff role at Google on AI tooling
Strong craftsmanship signals: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based dev, public talks, OSS test framework authorship
concerns: No demonstrated experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or metrics-platform experience
Limited evidence of cross-team platform leadership at the scale expected for IC6/Principal
Job titles suggest Senior/Staff trajectory rather than Principal-level systemic platform ownership

key_factors.factor: Senior IC depth and polyglot engineering breadth
Limited Principal-scale cross-team platform leadership evidence
